name: safehaven-platform
description: SafeHaven - Violence, Abuse, and Bullying Digital Reporting Platform

scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install -w backend && npm install -w frontend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules dist backend/dist frontend/dist
